dependent_to.description:
napari is a fast, interactive, multi-dimensional image viewer for
Python. It's designed for browsing, annotating, and analyzing large
multi-dimensional images. It's built on top of Qt (for the GUI), vispy
(for performant GPU-based rendering), and the scientific Python stack
(numpy, scipy).
dependent_to.name: py-napari

dependent_to.description: An open-source toolkit for computational pathology and machine learning.
dependent_to.name: py-pathml

dependent_to.description:
Pint is a Python package to define, operate and manipulate physical
quantities: the product of a numerical value and a unit of measurement.
It allows arithmetic operations between them and conversions from and to
different units.
dependent_to.name: py-pint

dependent_to.description:
SfePy (https://sfepy.org/) is a software for solving systems of coupled
partial differential equations (PDEs) by the finite element method in
1D, 2D and 3D. It can be viewed both as black-box PDE solver, and as a
Python package which can be used for building custom applications.
dependent_to.name: py-sfepy

dependent_to.description:
